summary: Routine Grove was optimized against eval_ui.json Lighthouse findings by adding accessible progressbar names, production SEO metadata, valid robots.txt output, immutable cache headers for hashed assets, proper 404 handling for missing assets, and regression smoke checks for these concerns.
verification: npm.cmd run lint passed with no warnings
npm.cmd run build passed and regenerated dist with meta description plus robots.txt
npm.cmd run smoke passed 18/18 production checks

Static server probe verified /robots.txt returns 200 text/plain, hashed JS returns cache-control public max-age=31536000 immutable, /not-found.txt returns 404 no-store, and navigation fallback still serves index.html

Existing eval_ui.json baseline had Performance 66, Accessibility 95, Best Practices 100, SEO 82, with known run caveats: PROTOCOL_TIMEOUT on FullPageScreenshot and Chrome extension performance warning
trace_note: Trace extraction path in skill points to a different workspace; non-fatal for this local MVP delivery.
